overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game engine resembling GTA V, depicting a nighttime walk along a wet coastal boardwalk. The clip begins beside a parked orange Jeep Wrangler on a rainy urban street and continues along a lamp-lit promenade with scattered pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking past a parked orange Jeep Wrangler on a wet asphalt street at night

entered.detail: orange Jeep Wrangler parked at the curb with visible front grille and headlights
dark green sedan parked further down the street
multi-story white building with arched windows and balconies
tall street lamp illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close-up view of an orange Jeep Wrangler parked on a wet asphalt street at night. The camera moves forward along the curb, passing the vehicle while street lamps reflect off the damp pavement. A white historic building with arched windows stands across the street.

events.description: approaching the building corner where the sidewalk opens to the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beside a white building with arched windows and metal railings

entered.detail: short metal posts lining the edge of the sidewalk
row of arched openings with black railings on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a concrete sidewalk next to the white historic building, passing metal bollards lining the curb. The building's arched windows and balconies are prominent on the right as the path approaches a corner opening onto a wider boardwalk area.

agents.ego_description: walking along the open boardwalk, passing other pedestrians and navigating the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera carrying a large cardboard box
walking in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: dark ocean visible beyond the boardwalk railing
black public trash bin on the left side of the walkway
set of stairs leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a wide coastal boardwalk illuminated by regularly spaced street lamps reflecting off the wet pavement. The historic building now runs along the left side while the right side opens to the ocean. Various pedestrians walk in both directions along the promenade, and the camera passes a trash can and stairs near the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, rain-slicked urban street into a wide, lamp-lit coastal promenade. It begins with a close-up of an orange Jeep Wrangler parked on wet asphalt, moving forward along the curb as street lamps reflect off the damp pavement. As the camera proceeds, it passes a series of metal bollards and follows the facade of a white historic building characterized by arched windows and balconies. The scene then opens and expands as the path turns a corner, shifting from the enclosed street to a broad boardwalk where the building now lines the left side. Finally, the view opens up to the ocean on the right, passing pedestrians and street furniture under the glow of regularly spaced lamps reflecting across the wet ground.
